use_cases: Display available tool integrations on a SaaS product landing page
Showcase connection options in a platform's settings or dashboard
Present a product's integration ecosystem in marketing materials
Highlight compatible third-party services in an app marketplace
ai_summary: A hero-style integration showcase component featuring animated highlighted titles with custom SVG underlines, an optional illustration area, and a responsive grid of integration cards. Built with Framer Motion for scroll animations and Tailwind CSS for styling. Designed to promote available tool connections and third-party integrations for SaaS platforms, developer tools, and marketplace products.
